title: Additional third party selection procedure description (D8.7)
author: van der Nolle, Florian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This deliverable report describes some background information regarding third parties in general, related Intellectual property rights, and the Confidential Disclosure Agreements (CDA). The project management office (PMO) of the ConcePTION consortium has developed a third party selection procedure approved by the Managing Board.
steps_raw: This deliverable report describes some background information regarding third parties in general, related Intellectual property rights, and the Confidential Disclosure Agreements (CDA). The project management office (PMO) of the ConcePTION consortium has developed a third party selection procedure approved by the Managing Board.
